nasb.text: Or do you think that I cannot appeal to My Father, and He will at once put at My disposal more than twelve legions of angels?

esv.text: Do you think that I cannot appeal to my Father, and he will at once send me more than twelve legions of angels?

cnv.text: 你以為我不能求我的父，他就馬上給我派十二營以上的天使下來嗎？

ccb.text: 难道你不知道，我可以请求我父马上派十二营以上的天使来保护我吗？

csbs.text: 难道你想我不能求我父，现在就为我派来十二个军团以上的天使吗？
